summary: Iteration 39: Comprehensive testing of visual improvements to public website page (/sito). All features verified working: Hero section with animated entrance, scroll indicator, navbar with glass-morphism, loyalty section with 5 reward tiers, contact section with hover effects, footer with social links. Mobile view tested with fixed bottom PRENOTA ORA button. Admin login verified working.
passed_tests: === BACKEND API TESTS ===
1. POST /api/auth/login - PASS: Returns access_token for admin@brunomelito.it
2. GET /api/public/website - PASS: Returns website config, reviews, gallery, services
3. GET /api/health - PASS: Returns {status: alive}
=== FRONTEND TESTS (Desktop) ===
1. Public page /sito loads - PASS: data-testid='website-landing' found
2. Hero section - PASS: Logo, title 'BRUNO MELITO HAIR', subtitle 'SOLO PER APPUNTAMENTO', PRENOTA ORA button visible
3. Navbar - PASS: Fixed at top with glass-morphism effect
4. Scroll indicator - PASS: 'SCORRI' text with animated icon visible
5. Loyalty section - PASS: All 5 reward tiers found (loyalty-reward-0 to loyalty-reward-4)
6. Loyalty tier 0 - PASS: '5 punti' = 'Buono sconto 3€'
7. Loyalty tier 1 - PASS: '10 punti' = 'Buono sconto 5€'
8. Loyalty tier 2 - PASS: '20 punti' = 'Piega o Taglio Gratuito'
9. Loyalty tier 3 - PASS: '30 punti' = 'Colore Parziale Gratuito'
10. Loyalty tier 4 - PASS: '50 punti' = 'Colore Completo Gratuito'
11. Loyalty text - PASS: '1 punto ogni €20 spesi' displayed
12. Contact section - PASS: Address, Phone, Email, Hours cards found
13. Social links - PASS: 5 social links found in footer/contact
14. PRENOTA ORA button - PASS: Opens booking dialog
15. Booking dialog - PASS: Shows service categories (Styling, Trattamenti, Colore, etc.)
=== FRONTEND TESTS (Mobile) ===
16. Mobile page loads - PASS: data-testid='website-landing' found
17. Mobile fixed bottom button - PASS: data-testid='website-mobile-book-btn' visible
18. Mobile loyalty section - PASS: All 5 reward tiers visible
19. Mobile booking dialog - PASS: Opens correctly with back button
=== ADMIN LOGIN TEST ===
20. Admin login - PASS: Login with admin@brunomelito.it redirects to Planning page
critical_code_review_comments: AnimatedSection component (lines 13-24): Uses IntersectionObserver for scroll-triggered fade-in animations - well implemented
GallerySection (lines 335-410): Lightbox with useState, prev/next navigation, counter - properly implemented but no gallery images in DB to test
LoyaltySection (lines 413-478): Progress line connecting 5 reward tiers with correct point values
ContactSection (lines 481-568): Animated icon hover effects with group-hover:scale-125 transition
Hero section: Includes scroll indicator ('SCORRI') with animated icon
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 39 verified all visual improvements to /sito page. Key features working: 1) AnimatedSection with IntersectionObserver for scroll animations. 2) Hero with logo, title, CTA buttons, scroll indicator. 3) Navbar with glass-morphism. 4) Loyalty section with 5 reward tiers (5pts=3€, 10pts=5€, 20pts=Piega/Taglio, 30pts=Colore Parziale, 50pts=Colore Completo). 5) Gallery lightbox implemented but no images in DB to test. 6) Contact section with animated hover effects. 7) Mobile fixed bottom PRENOTA ORA button. 8) Admin login working.

hero_section.details: Logo, title, subtitle, PRENOTA ORA button, scroll indicator all visible with animations

navbar_glassmorphism.details: Fixed navbar at top with backdrop-blur glass effect

loyalty_section.details: 5 reward tiers with correct point values and descriptions, progress line visible

gallery_lightbox.details: Lightbox code present with prev/next/close buttons, but no gallery images in database to test

contact_section.details: Address, phone, email, hours cards with hover effects, social links visible

mobile_view.details: Fixed bottom PRENOTA ORA button visible, all sections responsive

booking_dialog.details: Opens on PRENOTA ORA click, shows service categories

admin_login.details: POST /api/auth/login returns access_token, redirects to Planning page

console_errors.frontend: Only deprecation warnings (webpack dev server), no errors
